nasb.text: The hand of God was also on Judah to give them one heart to do what the king and the princes commanded by the word of the Lord.

esv.text: The hand of God was also on Judah to give them one heart to do what the king and the princes commanded by the word of the Lord.

cnv.text: 神的能力也幫助猶大人，使他們一心遵行王和眾領袖奉耶和華的命令發出的吩咐。

ccb.text: 耶和华上帝感动犹大人，使他们一心遵从王与众官员奉祂的指示所下的命令。
